message.content:
{
  "page_type": "fault_table",
  "summary": "This page displays two fault code tables from a Daikin HVAC manual, detailing common faults for outdoor units and system faults. Each table includes a fault code, judgment condition, causes, and corresponding remedies.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "table", "label": "1.2 Outdoor Unit Common Faults"},
    {"type": "table", "label": "1.3 System Common Faults"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Fault Code 15 (Compressor Output Current Overload)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Fault Code U1 (Reverse Phase, Open Phase)"},
    {"type": "list", "label": "Causes and Remedies for Fault 15"},
    {"type": "list", "label": "Causes and Remedies for Fault U1"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Related Information for Fault 15"},
    {"type": "logo", "label": "DAIKIN"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "Fault Code 15", "relation": "has judgment condition", "to": "Microcomputer detects compressor output current overload 16 times"},
    {"from": "Fault Code 15", "relation": "has causes and remedies", "to": "Causes and Remedies for Fault 15"},
    {"from": "Fault Code U1", "relation": "has judgment condition", "to": "Reverse phase monitor detects power phase loss or reverse phase"},
    {"from": "Fault Code U1", "relation": "has causes and remedies", "to": "Causes and Remedies for Fault U1"},
    {"from": "Related Information for Fault 15", "relation": "advises", "to": "Check wiring carefully to avoid component damage"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["fault_diagnosis", "troubleshooting", "HVAC_maintenance", "error_code_reference"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "1.2室外机常见故障\n故障代码: 15 (压缩机输出电流过载)\n判断条件: 微机检测到压缩机输出过电流16次\n原因对策:\n> 截止阀关闭导致过电流 ——检查系统(安装)\n> 电源电压异常导致过电流 ——检查电源(维修)\n> 电源晶体管故障导致过流 ——更换部品(维修)\n> 内部接线故障导致过流 ——检查线路(维修)\n> 电脑板故障导致过电流 ——更换部品(维修)\n> 压缩机故障导致过电流 ——更换部品(维修)\n相关信息:\n有些情况下内部接线错误会导致过电流，请仔细检查接线以免再次损坏部件\nDAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI\n1.3系统常见故障\n故障代码: U1 (反相、开相)\n判断条件: 反相监测器检测到电源缺相或反相\n原因对策:\n> 电源反相 ——检查电源(安装)\n> 电源开相 ——检查电源(安装)\n> 电源端子部插件接触不良 ——检查线路(维修)\n> 室外机电脑板不良 ——更换部品(维修)\nDAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The OCR text is clear and matches the visual content. No significant uncertainties in the relationships or entities. The page is a straightforward fault code table.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This page displays two fault code tables from a Daikin HVAC manual, detailing common faults for outdoor units and system faults. Each table includes a fault code, judgment condition, causes, and corresponding remedies.

visual_entities.label: Fault Code U1 (Reverse Phase, Open Phase)
Causes and Remedies for Fault U1

visual_relationships.to: Microcomputer detects compressor output current overload 16 times
Reverse phase monitor detects power phase loss or reverse phase
Causes and Remedies for Fault U1
Check wiring carefully to avoid component damage

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
1.2室外机常见故障
故障代码: 15 (压缩机输出电流过载)
判断条件: 微机检测到压缩机输出过电流16次
原因对策:
> 截止阀关闭导致过电流 ——检查系统(安装)
> 电源电压异常导致过电流 ——检查电源(维修)
> 电源晶体管故障导致过流 ——更换部品(维修)
> 内部接线故障导致过流 ——检查线路(维修)
> 电脑板故障导致过电流 ——更换部品(维修)
> 压缩机故障导致过电流 ——更换部品(维修)
相关信息:
有些情况下内部接线错误会导致过电流，请仔细检查接线以免再次损坏部件
DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI
1.3系统常见故障
故障代码: U1 (反相、开相)
判断条件: 反相监测器检测到电源缺相或反相
原因对策:
> 电源反相 ——检查电源(安装)
> 电源开相 ——检查电源(安装)
> 电源端子部插件接触不良 ——检查线路(维修)
> 室外机电脑板不良 ——更换部品(维修)
DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The OCR text is clear and matches the visual content. No significant uncertainties in the relationships or entities. The page is a straightforward fault code table.
